title: Build Hero section with brand statement, CTA, and craft imagery placeholder
acceptance_criteria: Hero section renders on the home page above the fold.
Headline uses Amatic SC and communicates handmade guitar/repair/violin craft.
Primary CTA links to /store and secondary CTA links to services/contact.
Atmospheric craft imagery placeholder is present and responsive (unoptimized Next/Image or img with src placeholder).
Liquid-glass style effects and smooth transitions follow MASTER.md.
Section is visually balanced at 375px, 768px, 1024px, and 1440px.
